parents.subject: LU-9653 utils: Add kernel doc style for utils (12)

commit.subject: LU-17000 lnet: Remove redundant NULL check
commit.message:
LU-17000 lnet: Remove redundant NULL check

Remove redundant NULL check for pointer net_l.
It would be impossible for net_l to be NULL as
it would be already set after lnet_net_unique().
And it being used by list_for_each_entry to iterate
list. If 'net_l' was NULL it would crash already.

CoverityID: 399690 ("Dereference before null check")
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: Ia755991d29d92f66e5fdec9eae80de5fb853dc5b
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62866
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
